sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n78556" key="parape/talos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">παραπέτᾰλος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n78556.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">covered with leaves</tr_> of gold or silver, <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">τριήρεις χρυσῷ τὰς πρύμνας π</foreign>. <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Anon.</author> </bibl> ap. <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Suid.</author> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
